productDisplayName: Vishudh Women Pigment Print Green Kurtas
description: Composition Printed kurta made of 100% cotton, that has a turquoise blue and green floral pattern, mega sleeves, mandarin collar with a split neckline and extended placket with hook closures, navy blue paneling on the collar, sleeve hems and and on the placket and slit side hems Fitting Slim Wash care Hand wash separately as colour may bleed Use mild detergent Do not dry in direct sunlight Do not bleach Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Use warm iron Upgrade your casual look with this fun kurta from vishudh! The turquoise blue and green floral print gives a vibrant look, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day long. Team it with leggings or a white loose kameez and sandals for a chilled out look. Model Statistics The model wears size M in kurtas Height-5.7", Chest-33"
